props.name: fit
props.description: Size factor for the dome radius based on container dimensions

props.name: minRadius
props.description: Minimum radius for the dome in pixels

props.name: maxRadius
props.description: Maximum radius for the dome in pixels

props.name: padFactor
props.description: Padding factor for the viewer area

props.name: overlayBlurColor
props.description: Color for the outer portion of the radial overlay blur

props.name: maxVerticalRotationDeg
props.description: Maximum vertical rotation angle in degrees

props.name: enlargeTransitionMs
props.description: Duration of image enlargement transition in milliseconds

props.name: segments
props.description: Number of segments for both X and Y to keep the dome proportional

props.name: dragDampening
props.description: Damping factor for drag inertia (0-1, higher = more damping)

props.name: imageBorderRadius
props.description: Border radius for closed tile images

props.name: grayscale
props.description: Whether to render all images in grayscale
